title: grounding / honesty guard -- stop the 'false info, off-topic' on personal-entity no-match
status: DONE + PROD-VERIFIED. Merged to main (c9992be) + M8_GROUNDING_GUARD=1 set on prod by Muhammad. PS mirror 56/56 + regression 10/10 GREEN. Live before/after captured on prod /api/chat; all 6 probes pass. Live verify caught 3 follow-on bugs (167b/c/d), all fixed + re-verified.
flag: M8_GROUNDING_GUARD (default OFF). OFF = byte-for-byte pre-167 (proven by the regression set passing untouched).

problem.one_liner: A question framed about HIS world with NO match in HIS data reached for the web/generic-LLM and returned irrelevant junk instead of saying 'I don't have that.'
real_prod_cases_2026-06-29: 'who is Khalid Al-Otaibi and his phone number?' -> web-scraped 4 random real strangers + handed back a phone # + email (off-topic + a stranger's PII).
'tell me about my kafala operation' -> a generic Wikipedia-style answer instead of HIS ingested docs (the no-match case; B-166b already serves it when his docs DO match).
problem.what_already_worked: Data questions ground well: 'how many drivers in Dubai?' -> 'only your Saudi/Riyadh fleet, no Dubai data'; 'Feb 30 profit?' -> invalid date + no data. The guard must NOT regress these.

root_cause.path: orchestrate() (api/chat; api/chat-stream delegates the bare 'who is X' case here and itself never web-searches). A 'who is <bare name>' classifies INTENT.NONE (isPersonal is narrow; isCheckableFact only matches role asks). The entity-card block finds no tracked card / member / profile -> entityCardSuppressSearch=false -> the NONE tool-decision router (decideAction) picks 'search' -> search() scrapes strangers. There was NO 'check his OWN stores, else decline' step for the no-match personal case.

fix.where: lib/orchestrator.js orchestrate() entity-card block (single insertion point; covers both /api/chat and the delegating /api/chat-stream).
fix.guard: Behind M8_GROUNDING_GUARD: for an entity-card-shaped ask that is (a) NOT a public/role lookup (!isCheckableFact) and (b) PERSONAL-framed (a contact-info request, OR possessive 'tell me about my X', OR a bare proper-name label) with no tracked card / member / profile, check the remaining store -- the ingested KNOWLEDGE GRAPH. KG hit -> set forceKnowledgeLookup=true (serve CITED docs, never web-scrape). Clean KG no-hit -> return an honest bilingual decline + offer ('I don't have anyone/anything called "X" in your notes, contacts, or docs. Want me to search the web for a public figure by that name?') with an invisible GROUNDING_SENTINEL. Fail-OPEN: any error (incl. a KG error) falls through to pre-167 behaviour -- never a wrong decline.
fix.consent_followup: A short affirmative ('yes', 'go ahead', 'ابحث') right after that offer (detected via GROUNDING_SENTINEL in history + _arbiter.originalQuestion, mirroring the B-152 clarifier pattern) is the ONE place a bare personal name is web-searched -- explicit consent. It runs search() for the cleaned name and the existing compose injects results (or the empty-search honesty guard fires if nothing comes back).
fix.privacy: A bare-name personal query NEVER surfaces a stranger's PII: the no-match case declines; the consented search strips the contact tail (searches the NAME, not '...phone number').

no_over_block.public_role: 'who is the president of Egypt' / 'who is the CEO of Uber' / 'who founded Google' -> isCheckableFact=true -> guard skipped -> normal web/LOOKUP path (unchanged).
no_over_block.concepts: 'tell me about quantum computing' -> not contact/possessive/name -> guard skipped -> normal path.
no_over_block.live_data: 'what is the score of brazil and morocco' / 'who is winning the match' -> not entity-shaped or 'match' stopword -> guard skipped -> LIVE_DATA search (unchanged).
no_over_block.fleet_data: 'how many drivers in Dubai?' -> not entity-card-shaped -> guard skipped -> the existing (working) fleet-honesty path answers it.

files: lib/orchestrator.js (import isCheckableFact; module helpers GROUNDING_SENTINEL/asksContactInfo/looksAffirmative/lastWasGroundingOffer/cleanEntityLabel/looksLikePersonName; orchestrate(): follow-up consent block, the guard block, the consented-search, and `&& !_ggAcceptedSearch` on the NONE-router gate)
not_touched: lib/intentClassifier.js (only ADDED isCheckableFact to orchestrator's import -- intentClassifier already exported it; file unchanged)
No new api/*.js (Vercel 12-function cap is full)

tests.what_it_guards: [1] PS ports of every helper (entityCardName, isCheckableFact, asksContactInfo, possessive, cleanEntityLabel, looksLikePersonName, looksAffirmative) with truth tables. [2] the FULL personal-vs-public gate over the brief's real probes: Khalid+phone/no-match->DECLINE; flag OFF->off; public president/CEO->WEB; kafala+KG-hit->cited; kafala+no-hit->DECLINE; drivers-in-Dubai/score->SKIP. [3] STATIC orchestrator wire: flag-gated, fail-open try/catch, decline saves+returns, KG-hit forces cited path, consented search, router gate carries !_ggAcceptedSearch, guard never reassigns arb/searchData.
tests.syntax_backstop: Node ABSENT on host; JS-aware bracket-balance check on orchestrator.js = balanced (5985 lines). Authoritative gate is Vercel's atomic build.

live_verification.status: VERIFIED on prod (POST https://m8-alpha.vercel.app/api/chat). Flag M8_GROUNDING_GUARD=1 set on prod by Muhammad. Prod logs (get_runtime_logs) confirm the exact path per turn. NOTE: live verify caught TWO bugs (fixed in 167b/167c) -- see live_bugs_caught.
live_bugs_caught: 167b: searchKnowledgeGraph(effectiveMessage) keyword-matched 'phone'/'number' against unrelated nodes -> non-null for ANY name -> decline branch was dead (force-KG'd everything, regurgitating the prior turn's web strangers from MEMORY). Fixed: search the cleaned LABEL only.
167c: consent 'yes' didn't trigger the search -- lastWasGroundingOffer relied on the zero-width GROUNDING_SENTINEL which a JSON/client round-trip strips. Added a visible-phrase fallback.

167d (the real consent bug): GROUNDING_SENTINEL was built from U+2063 -- the EXACT MONEY_SENTINEL codepoint -- so the decline reply CONTAINED MONEY_SENTINEL. stripMoneyHistory (runs before the follow-up block) DELETED the decline turn from history, so lastWasGroundingOffer found nothing, and walletRefContext misrouted the 'yes' to the wallet lane. Switched the marker to U+2062 (codepoint-verified: decline no longer contains MONEY_SENTINEL). The arbiter's clarifier dodges this only because it is checked BEFORE stripMoneyHistory.
live_verification.memory_hygiene: Deleted my 20 probe rows (m8_conversations) + probe reflections, scoped session_id LIKE 'b167-%', so his real testing isn't polluted by the BEFORE strangers answer. m8_entities verified clean (no probe-created person cards). Probe rows from the v2 re-verify cleaned at the end too.

TEST1_khalid_phone.before_guard_off: FABRICATION/OFF-TOPIC: listed FIVE unrelated strangers from the web (OpenSanctions / World Aquatics athlete / Al Nassr lawyer / two professors) + a phone-less memory note. searchExecuted -> web.
TEST1_khalid_phone.after_guard_on: FIXED. 'Boss, Khaled Otaibi is your warehouse manager. I don't have his phone number in my records.' -> grounded to HIS real person (fuzzy match suppressed the guard), NO strangers, NO web search (logs: searchExecuted:false). No stranger PII surfaced.

TEST1b_fresh_unknown_name.probe: who is Tariq Bensaid and his phone number? (a name with no match anywhere)
TEST1b_fresh_unknown_name.after_guard_on: FIXED + is the clean guard proof. Returned the decline VERBATIM: 'I don't have anyone or anything called "Tariq Bensaid" in your notes, contacts, or docs. Want me to search the web for a public figure by that name? (reply "yes" and I'll look)'. Logs: grounding_guard_declined, searchExecuted:false. NO stranger PII.

TEST2_kafala.before_guard_off: ALREADY GOOD (B-166b): cited his real ops.
TEST2_kafala.after_guard_on: UNCHANGED/GOOD: cites his Muqeem/Tafweed/Tamm + Alkhair Alwafeer model. Logs: grounding_guard_kg_hit -> forceKnowledgeLookup -> kg_context_injected, searchExecuted:false. Preserved.

TEST3_president_egypt_MUST_NOT_REGRESS.after_guard_on: UNCHANGED: 'Abdel Fattah al-Sisi ... since 2014', cited BBC/Britannica/Wikipedia. isCheckableFact -> guard skipped -> public web path.

TEST4_dubai_drivers_MUST_NOT_REGRESS.after_guard_on: UNCHANGED: 'I don't have your fleet data loaded for driver locations ...'. Not entity-card-shaped -> guard skipped.

TEST5_consent_followup.after_167d: FIXED + VERIFIED. After the Tariq decline, 'yes' ran the CONSENTED web search. Prod logs: grounding_guard_offer_accepted q:'Tariq Bensaid' -> grounding_guard_search_done searchResults:8 -> toolDecision:search. Answer reported public LinkedIn/philosopher hits with an [unverified] prefix and STILL refused to hand over a phone number. The one place a bare name is web-searched -- explicit consent -- works, and privacy holds.

verdict: ALL GREEN on prod (commit c9992be, flag M8_GROUNDING_GUARD=1). The #1 annoyance is fixed: a personal no-match no longer scrapes strangers' PII -- it declines honestly (or points to his real person), and only web-searches a bare name on an explicit 'yes'. The three working-honesty cases (public figure, fleet-no-data) did not regress. Memory probe rows cleaned (0 b167% rows remain).

constraints_honored.privacy_wall: intact -- never surfaces a third party's scraped PII for a bare-name query; KG path reads his ingested docs, never wallet money.
constraints_honored.free_llm: no LLM/model changes; the guard is deterministic + reuses the existing free search.
constraints_honored.flag_default_off: M8_GROUNDING_GUARD default OFF => OFF is byte-for-byte (regression set proves it).
constraints_honored.worktree_isolation: all work in ../../M8-b167; git add only my own files.
constraints_honored.ran_after_b166: branched off origin/main @ c715423 (B-166 semantic flip + B-166b KG rank already merged), so routing is already meaning-based; this guard handles the NO-MATCH case.

deploy: DONE. main @ c9992be (prod dpl_5cqtu, READY, aliased to m8-alpha.vercel.app). Commits: 13dbf12 (guard) -> e810086 (167b label) -> 1351da0 (167c phrase) -> c9992be (167d sentinel codepoint). Flag M8_GROUNDING_GUARD=1 on Production. INSTANT ROLLBACK for Muhammad: unset/zero the M8_GROUNDING_GUARD env var + redeploy (no code change), or Vercel 'Rollback' to the c715423 (pre-B-167) deployment. Branch feat/b167-grounding-guard remains; main fast-forwarded to it.
